body:
Unfortunately, I think #999 was problematic because [this build's stack trace](https://buildkite.com/clima/climaatmos-ci/builds/5308#01844e07-8b58-45bd-9033-797d5ee723ec/140-179) shows that there's some sort of infinite recursion hit in the `Base.show` and, as a result, no useful stack trace information is available.

I'll open an issue regarding this but, until we can make a reproducer / fix it, let's revert so that we at least preserve useful stack traces.
title: Revert #999, bump patch version for release

body:
I don't think we need the compat any more

title: udpate docs Project/Manifest
